name: Prizewinning Lemon Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. Grease twelve 3-inch muffin pan cups. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; add cinnamon if desired. Add blueberries and toss to coat with the flour mixture; set aside.
2. In a medium microwave-safe bowl, melt butter on medium (50%), for 10 to 15 seconds, or until melted. Cool slightly, then add yogurt, egg, lemon rind, and lemon and vanilla extracts; beat until blended.
3. Stir the yogurt mixture into the flour-blueberry mixture just until blended and dry ingredients are moistened. Do not overmix. Divide batter among muffin pan cups. Bake 20 to 25 minutes or until muffins spring back when gently pressed with a fingertip. Cool in pan on wire rack for 5 minutes. Remove muffins from cups and serve warm.
Nutrition information per muffin: protein: 4 grams; fat: 4 grams; carbohydrate: 32 grams; fiber: 1 gram; sodium: 238 milligrams; cholesterol: 26 milligrams; calories: 161.
Source: 1994 COUNTRY COOKING, p.110
From: Sallie Krebs Date: 08-26-94
